dependencies: Third-party cloud services for SaaS infrastructure
Consumer reporting agencies (Experian, TransUnion, Equifax) for Scores distribution
risks: Reliance on three major consumer reporting agencies for substantial portion of Scores revenue
Dependence on third-party cloud service providers for SaaS delivery
Potential disruption from third-party data center failures or outages
Cybersecurity threats to supply chain software and materials

regulatory_risks: GDPR compliance in European Union and United Kingdom - strict obligations on personal data collection, use, and cross-border transfers
California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) and California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA) - expanded privacy rights and disclosure requirements
Multiple U.S. state privacy laws with effective dates ranging from 2023 through 2026
EU AI Act - requirements for artificial intelligence systems including credit scoring, effective 2024-2026
CFPB inquiry into fees charged for credit reports and credit scores in mortgage market
CFPB potential rules extending FCRA to business practices not currently subject to the statute
Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA) compliance requirements for accuracy, fairness, and privacy
Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act (GLBA) requirements for non-public personal information security
HIPAA and HITECH compliance as business associate for healthcare clients
Dodd-Frank Act UDAAP provisions and CFPB supervision authority
FHFA validation and approval requirements for FICO Score use by Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac under 12 CFR Part 1254
Federal Trade Commission Act enforcement on data security and unfair/deceptive practices
Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA) potential application to credit monitoring services
State insurance restrictions on use of credit-based insurance scores
Fair lending laws including Equal Credit Opportunity Act and Fair Housing Act
Algorithmic fairness and accountability regulations for AI and machine learning
Cybersecurity incident disclosure requirements for public companies under SEC regulations
Export control regulations and Office of Foreign Asset Control (OFAC) sanctions
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act and UK Bribery Act 2010 compliance
Climate-related disclosure requirements from California, SEC, and EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive

sanction_risks: Office of Foreign Asset Control (OFAC) sanctions restricting transactions with sanctioned parties
Export Administration Regulations affecting FICO products delivered in non-U.S. countries or to foreign nationals
Geopolitical tensions and military conflicts impacting global operations
Trade policies and tariffs affecting international business
